name: theme-font-cs-slot
description: Paragraph style sets csTheme='minorBidi' (no explicit cs font). Run has w:cs to force cs font slot. The theme's minorBidi font should be resolved and used as font_family.
expected_behavior: font_cs should resolve to the theme's minor Bidi font name. Since cs=true, font_family should also be that font.
current_status: GAP-130 — theme cs font resolve end-to-end
